description: Lighthouse provides commercial intelligence and revenue-management software for hotels and the travel and hospitality industry. Its platform includes market, pricing, parity, demand, and distribution-related products and data services.
summary: mylighthouse.com exposes one documented HTTP API surface at `https://api.mylighthouse.com/v3`, authenticated with a Lighthouse-issued API token sent in the `X-Oi-Authorization` header; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surface was found on the domain.
